jobPostingInfo.title: Senior Software Engineer — Platform
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
Acme is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Platform team. You will own the design and delivery of services that underpin our entire product suite, and work with a world-class team of engineers.

Responsibilities

  • Architect and build scalable backend services
  • Collaborate across product, infra, and security teams
  • Mentor engineers across the department
  • Drive technical excellence and reliability

Requirements

  • 6+ years of backend experience
  • Strong CS fundamentals
  • Experience with AWS, Kubernetes, or equivalent
  • Excellent written and verbal communication
